query: I need help designing a caching layer for our user session service that handles 10k requests per second with a 95% read ratio
expected_behavior: Agent auto-detects cache mode based on caching/session service context
Agent asks about or infers access patterns (read/write ratio, TTL tolerance, consistency)
Agent recommends specific eviction policy (likely LRU or LFU given read-heavy workload)
Agent specifies write policy, invalidation strategy, and capacity planning
Agent includes trade-offs for the recommended approach
Agent does NOT recommend running a load test itself
